summary: Improve fallback and LLM report analysis structure, source confidence, and company-mapping guidance with tests.
Make RSS publishing base URL configurable through SITE_URL while preserving local defaults.
Prepare GitHub remote setup documentation and stop before external repo, push, Pages, or secrets decisions.
Harden GitHub Actions with tests before generation, caching, concurrency, and clearer idempotent commits.
Fallback report now includes market breadth, event source confidence, and company-mapping verification guidance; pytest focused and full suites passed.
SITE_URL now configures RSS base URL with default fallback; focused/full pytest and py src/main.py passed.
Workflow now runs tests before generation, uses pip caching and concurrency, passes SITE_URL, and pushes only when generated outputs change; pytest and YAML parse passed.
Prepared GitHub remote setup guide and README link; stopped before external repo, push, Pages, secrets, or SITE_URL decisions.
